particulars.description: The freehold property known as 23 alfred street, westbury, BA13 3DY and registered at land registry under title number WT163004.

persons_entitled.name: Onesavings Bank PLC Trading as Rely Mortgages

particulars.description: The borrower with full title guarantee charges the property known as 39 bath road, swindon, wiltshire, SN1 4AS, registered with title number WT66825, by way of legal mortgage as security for the payment of the sums detailed in panel 9. the lender is under an obligation to make further advances and applies for the obligation to be entered in the register.. Please see charge for more details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities the company (with full title guarantee) hereby charges to the lender:. 3.1 by way of first legal mortgage all land being any estate, right or interest in or over land, whether legal or equitable, and wherever the land is situated, including without limitation any buildings and fixtures on land, and the benefit of any covenants or rights owed to any person or enforceable by him by virtue of the ownership, possession or occupation of land, but for these purposes ‘land’ excludes heritable property in scotland, now owned by the company including (without limitation) the land which is described in schedule 1 (if any); and. 3.2 by way of first fixed equitable charge all land which the company acquires in the future.. 3.3 by way of separate first fixed charges:. 3.3.4 the intellectual property. Please see the legal charge for more detail.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the borrower’s obligations, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender:. 9.2.1 by way of legal mortgage, the property being 23 alfred street, westbury, wiltshire, BA13 3DY.. Please see the legal charge for more detail.
